Localization.Description: A user created, renamed, or removed a user group, or a user changed a policy of a user group

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} renamed the user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created the user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed the user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} changed a policy of the user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
